title: Decadent Charred Spanish Cheese Pa Amb Tomaquet
description: A rich and satisfying Spanish dish featuring charred bread, melted cheese, and a side of creamy creme fraiche, perfect for a midnight craving. This halal-friendly recipe is made with namul-blanch-seasoned tomatoes and crispy bread.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Slice the bread into 1-inch thick slices and place on a baking sheet.
Drizzle the olive oil over the bread and sprinkle with minced garlic.
Bake the bread in the oven for 10 minutes, or until lightly charred.
While the bread is baking, slice the cheese into thin strips.
Remove the bread from the oven and top each slice with a slice of cheese.
Return the bread to the oven and bake for an additional 2 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
While the cheese is melting, mix the creme fraiche with a pinch of salt and pepper.
Remove the bread from the oven and top each slice with a dollop of creme fraiche and a few slices of namul-blanch-seasoned tomato.
